zh.lifeSummary: 當Åsta Astrid Gudbrandsdatter of Uplands, Queen of Norway於0970年出生在挪威奧普藍德古德布藍德斯達倫時，她的父親Gudbrand "Kula" Olafsson Earl Of Uplands47歲，母親Ulfhild Gunhild Thorasdottir43歲。她於大約0997年與Sigurd Syr King of Ringeringe在挪威結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1020年之後在挪威布斯克呂郡林格利可，埋葬在挪威諾爾-特洛德拉格福拉坦格 普雷斯特爾德奧普藍德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Åsta Astrid Gudbrandsdatter of Uplands, Queen of Norway于0970年出生在挪威奧普藍德古德布藍德斯達倫时，她的父亲Gudbrand "Kula" Olafsson Earl Of Uplands47岁，母亲Ulfhild Gunhild Thorasdottir43岁。她于大约0997年与Sigurd Syr King of Ringeringe在挪威结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1020年之后在挪威布斯克呂郡林格利可，埋葬在挪威諾爾-特洛德拉格福拉坦格 普雷斯特爾德奧普藍德。

nameMeanings.name: Åsta
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the Old Norse personal name Ásta, from ást ‘love‘.

variants.name: Astrid
meanings: name, derived from Old Norse áss ‘god’ + fríðr ‘fair, beautiful’. It came into use in the English-speaking world during the 20th century, influenced to some extent by Queen Astrid of the Belgians ( 1905–35 ).

nameMeanings.name: Astrid
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: name, derived from Old Norse áss ‘god’ + fríðr ‘fair, beautiful’. It came into use in the English-speaking world during the 20th century, influenced to some extent by Queen Astrid of the Belgians ( 1905–35 ).

historicEvents.title: Christianity to Norway
historicEvents.description: "King Olav Tryggvason and King Olav Haraldsson ""The Holy"" brought Christianity to Norway."

en.lifeSummary: When Åsta Astrid Gudbrandsdatter of Uplands, Queen of Norway was born in 0970, in Gudbrandsdalen, Oppland, Norway, her father, Gudbrand "Kula" Olafsson Earl Of Uplands, was 47 and her mother, Ulfhild Gunhild Thorasdottir, was 43. She married Sigurd Syr King of Ringeringe about 0997, in Norway. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. She died after 1020, in Ringerike, Buskerud, Norway, and was buried in Oppland, Flatanger Prestegjeld, Nord-Trøndelag, Norway.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Åsta Astrid Gudbrandsdatter of Uplands, Queen of Norway est née en 0970, à Gudbrandsdalen, Oppland, Norvège, son père, Gudbrand "Kula" Olafsson Earl Of Uplands, avait 47 ans et sa mère, Ulfhild Gunhild Thorasdottir, avait 43 ans. Elle a épousé Sigurd Syr King of Ringeringe environ 0997, à Norvège. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée après 1020, à Ringerike, Buskerud, Norvège, et a été enterrée à Oppland, Flatanger Prestegjeld, Nord-Trøndelag, Norvège.

de.lifeSummary: Als Åsta Astrid Gudbrandsdatter of Uplands, Queen of Norway 0970 in Gudbrandsdalen, Oppland, Norwegen geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Gudbrand "Kula" Olafsson Earl Of Uplands 47 und ihre Mutter Ulfhild Gunhild Thorasdottir 43. Sie hat um 0997 in Norwegen Sigurd Syr King of Ringeringe geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb nach 1020 in Ringerike, Buskerud, Norwegen und wurde in Oppland, Flatanger Prestegjeld, Nord-Trøndelag, Norwegen begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Åsta Astrid Gudbrandsdatter of Uplands, Queen of Norway è nata il nel 0970 nel Gudbrandsdalen, Oppland, Norvegia, sua padre, Gudbrand "Kula" Olafsson Earl Of Uplands, aveva 47 anni e sua madre, Ulfhild Gunhild Thorasdottir, aveva 43 anni. Lei sposato Sigurd Syr King of Ringeringe circa 0997, nel Norvegia. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie. Morì dopo il 1020, nel Ringerike, Buskerud, Norvegia, e fu sepolta a Oppland, Flatanger Prestegjeld, Nord-Trøndelag, Norvegia.

ja.lifeSummary: Åsta Astrid Gudbrandsdatter of Uplands, Queen of Norwayが0970年にノルウェーオップランドグドブランドスダレンで生まれた時，父Gudbrand "Kula" Olafsson Earl Of Uplandsは47歳，母Ulfhild Gunhild Thorasdottirは43歳であった。約0997年にノルウェーでSigurd Syr King of Ringeringeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1020年以後にノルウェーブスケルドリンジャーアイクで死去し，ノルウェーノード-トルoンデラグフラタンジャー プレステグジェルドオップランドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Åsta Astrid Gudbrandsdatter of Uplands, Queen of Norway(이)가 0970년 노르웨이 플랜드 구드브랜드즈다렌에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Gudbrand "Kula" Olafsson Earl Of Uplands(은)는 47세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Ulfhild Gunhild Thorasdottir(은)는 43세였다. 그녀는 대략 0997년 노르웨이에서 Sigurd Syr King of Ringeringe(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1020년 이후 노르웨이 버스케루드 링릭에서 사망했으며 노르웨이 노르드-트o들라그 플라탠거 플레스테기드 플랜드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Åsta Astrid Gudbrandsdatter of Uplands, Queen of Norway nasceu em 0970, em Gudbrandsdalen, Oppland, Noruega, seu pai, Gudbrand "Kula" Olafsson Earl Of Uplands, tinha 47 anos e sua mãe, Ulfhild Gunhild Thorasdottir, tinha 43 anos. Ela casou-se com Sigurd Syr King of Ringeringe aproximadamente 0997, em Noruega. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu após 1020, em Ringerike, Buskerud, Noruega, e foi sepultada em Oppland, Flatanger Prestegjeld, Nord-Trøndelag, Noruega.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Åsta Astrid Gudbrandsdatter of Uplands, Queen of Norway родилась в 0970 г. в местности гудбрэндсдеилен, оппланд, Норвегия, её отцу по имени Gudbrand "Kula" Olafsson Earl Of Uplands было 47 лет, а матери, которую звали Ulfhild Gunhild Thorasdottir, 43. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sigurd Syr King of Ringeringe около 0997 г. в местности Норвегия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла после 1020 г. в местности рингираик, бускируд, Норвегия и была похоронена в местности оппланд, флатангир престегджелд, норд-трoнделаг, Норвегия.

sm.Between 1020 and 975: mai le 0975 e o'o I le 1020

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Åsta Astrid Gudbrandsdatter of Uplands, Queen of Norway nació en 0970, en Gudbrandsdalen, Oppland, Noruega, su papá, Gudbrand "Kula" Olafsson Earl Of Uplands, tenía 47 años y su mamá, Ulfhild Gunhild Thorasdottir, tenía 43 años. Se casó con Sigurd Syr King of Ringeringe aproximadamente 0997, en Noruega. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió después de 1020, en Ringerike, Buskerud, Noruega, y fue sepultada en Oppland, Flatanger Prestegjeld, Nord-Trøndelag, Noruega.
